props.label: At a Glance · From the Tape Desk

bullets.text: Brent briefly crossed $95 before trading near $94.07, up about 3.4%, as four more tankers diverted from the Red Sea.
Bank Indonesia held its main rate at 5.75% and widened incentives for foreign investors to hedge rupiah exposure.
South Africa’s annual inflation rate rose to 5.0% in June from 4.5% in May, exceeding the 4.7% consensus.
US commercial crude inventories increased by two million barrels to 411.7 million, still 6% below their five-year seasonal average.

items.what: The FIFA disciplinary call remains open until today’s deadline; an investigation still does not qualify as a formal charge.
SpaceX is targeting a 5:45 p.m. Central launch window for Starship Flight 13 after last week’s ignition abort.
The Brent call requires an official daily settlement above $95; Wednesday’s intraday print does not close it.
The United States and Iran have four days left to announce a ceasefire or formal pause in strikes.
Moonshot’s full Kimi K3 weights and the next qualifying Ebola update each face separate Monday deadlines.
Alphabet’s earnings materials must reaffirm or raise its 2026 capital-spending guidance to settle the open call early.

props.meta: Calls carried unchanged from the 21 Jul bell · no new posterior quorum · FIFA remains open until 23:59 UTC

open_calls.question: The United States and Iran announce a ceasefire or a formal pause in strikes
open_calls.detail: No qualifying announcement has appeared. The 21 July house value remains frozen until the desk receives a new multi-agent posterior quorum.

open_calls.question: Front-month Brent crude settles above $95 a barrel on a trading day this week
open_calls.detail: Brent traded above $95 on Wednesday, but an intraday print is not a settlement. The 21 July house value remains frozen pending qualifying close data and a new quorum.

open_calls.question: FIFA opens a formal disciplinary charge against the Argentine federation over the final brawl or the Malvinas banner
open_calls.detail: FIFA has appointed a prosecutor to investigate potential breaches, but no qualifying formal charge is public. The call stays open until 23:59 UTC at its frozen 21 July value.

open_calls.question: Moonshot releases the full Kimi K3 model weights
open_calls.detail: The public target remains 27 July. An API or documentation does not qualify without downloadable full weights; the 21 July value is unchanged.

open_calls.question: SpaceX Starship Flight 13 lifts off
open_calls.detail: SpaceX has announced a Thursday window after the 16 July abort. Only liftoff settles the call; the 21 July value remains unchanged.

open_calls.question: The next WHO update shows the DRC Bundibugyo Ebola death toll above 900
open_calls.detail: Newer DRC figures have appeared in wire reporting, but the qualifying WHO update is not retrievable. The source gap leaves the call open at its 21 July value.

open_calls.question: Alphabet reaffirms or raises its 2026 capital-spending guidance at earnings this week
open_calls.detail: The qualifying investor-relations release or transcript was not public at the edition bell. The 21 July house value remains unchanged.

lead.kicker: The Outer System Is Part of the Sandbox
lead.what: Pillar published reproduced boundary-bypass cases across Cursor, Codex, Gemini CLI and Antigravity. The cases require different host integrations, and broad exploitation in the wild has not been shown.

rest.what: Codex CLI 0.145.0 added an experimental path for migrating Cursor and Claude Code settings, MCP servers, plugins, sessions, commands and project memories, widening both portability and the inherited trust surface.

lead.what: OpenAI committed Codex and API access to the US Energy Department’s Genesis Mission as DOE selected 278 scientific projects for award negotiations.

rest.what: OpenAI said its proposed Effingham County campus is designed around 3.2 gigawatts of phased Georgia Power capacity between 2028 and 2032, with local ratepayer and water commitments.

lead.what: NVIDIA and Hugging Face released the four-billion-parameter Cosmos 3 Edge world model with weights and post-training scripts. Its 15-hertz Jetson Thor claim still needs independent field testing.

rest.kicker: The FCC Draws a Drone Line
rest.what: The US regulator sought comment on restrictions for several categories of foreign military-grade drones while extending Blue UAS and Buy America exceptions. No final categorical ban has been adopted.
